description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical plastic bottle with a slightly tapered neck and a screw cap. The bottle is predominantly light blue with a grid pattern and a large, partially faded blue label featuring white text and graphics. The surface shows significant signs of wear, including multiple dents, scratches, and scuff marks, especially around the midsection and near the cap. There are two prominent oval indentations on opposite sides of the bottle, likely for grip. The label appears to have the word 'Amigo' and possibly other text, but much of it is obscured or worn away. The overall appearance suggests the bottle has been used and exposed to outdoor elements.
description: A tall, light blue plastic bottle with a faded blue and white label, visible dents, and grip indentations. The surface is worn and scratched, indicating heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main blue and white label with the word 'Amigo' partially visible, and some surface dents and scratches.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a large oval indentation for grip and more pronounced dents and scuff marks.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the grid pattern with minimal label coverage and less visible text, showing more of the plain bottle surface.
description_view_3: This side view displays the second grip indentation and a partial view of the label, with additional surface wear.
attribute_label_or_branding: Faded blue and white label with the word 'Amigo' in large white letters, grid pattern background, and partial text; label is worn and partially obscured.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Multiple dents, scratches, scuff marks, and worn label.

license_info.creator_display_name: Archeoplastica: il museo dei rifiuti spiaggiati
